summary: Completed comprehensive testing of POSx Suite - backend APIs working perfectly (100% success), frontend UI functional but has critical session management and routing issues

ui_bugs.issue: Admin users (PIN 123456) redirected to /cashier instead of /admin after login
Authentication sessions not maintained - users redirected to login after actions
Cart not cleared after successful checkout completion
Product clicks intercepted on mobile - overlay issues preventing interaction

integration_issues.issue: Products page navigation fails from admin dashboard
No receipt modal or clear success indication after payment

passed_tests: Backend CRUD operations (users, products, orders, customers)
Frontend login page UI and keypad functionality
Frontend product grid display and category filtering
Database seeding and sample data creation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical session management issue causing authentication redirects, fix admin routing bug redirecting admin users to cashier page instead of admin dashboard, implement proper checkout completion flow with cart clearing
